page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn8ia.64xlarge is a GPU-accelerated bare-metal instance designed for high-density compute workloads. It features 256 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 9T34 processors running at a base frequency of 3.4 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 6.0 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, the instance integrates four NVIDIA L20 GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 160 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer between nodes and storage systems. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high density of dedicated physical cores combined with multiple enterprise GPUs offers a consolidated hardware profile that reduces the physical footprint and management overhead of multi-node clusters, though the lack of local storage represents a tradeoff that requires network-attached storage planning for I/O-heavy workloads.

The hardware configuration makes this server suitable for distributed machine learning inference, large language model deployment, high-performance computing simulations, and parallel data processing tasks. The combination of high-frequency dedicated AMD EPYC cores and NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs supports intensive parallel computing workloads, rendering it appropriate for enterprise-level AI workloads and complex scientific computations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn8ia.64xlarge is a high-performance, GPU-accelerated bare-metal server designed for compute-intensive workloads. It features 256 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 9T34 processors operating at 3.4 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory and four NVIDIA L20 GPUs from the Ada Lovelace architecture, providing a total of 192 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 160 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for parallel processing, making it highly suitable for machine learning inference, large-scale simulations, and high-performance computing tasks where dedicated CPU resources and GPU acceleration are critical.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn8ia.64xlarge is a bare-metal server with 256 AMD EPYC cores, 1536 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA L20 GPUs with 192 GB VRAM, designed for high-performance computing and AI workloads.

tagline: A high-density bare-metal platform combining 256 dedicated AMD EPYC cores with four NVIDIA L20 GPUs for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 256 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores operating at 3.4 GHz.
Four NVIDIA L20 GPUs providing 192 GB of total VRAM.
1536.0 GB of system memory with 6.0 GB per core.
160 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer.
No local storage included, requiring network-attached storage solutions.
Optimized for machine learning inference, HPC, and parallel data processing.
